name: BrowserHistory
summary: The BrowserHistory collector shows the BrowserHistory entries of a Windows operating system.

fields.name: last_visit_time
fields.description: Time of last visit. The string represents the FILETIME structure which is a 64-bit value representing the number of 100-nanosecond intervals since January 1, 1601 (UTC).

fields.name: visit_count
fields.description: Number of times the URL was visited.

fields.name: visit_from
fields.description: The website from which this webpage was reached.

fields.name: browser
fields.description: Name of the browser which accessed this webpage. The possible values are: Google Chrome Mozilla Firefox Microsoft Edge Microsoft Internet Explorer
enum: Google Chrome Mozilla Firefox Microsoft Edge Microsoft Internet Explorer

fields.name: user_profile
fields.description: The user profile used to access the webpage.

fields.name: browser_profile
fields.description: The browser profile used to access the webpage.

fields.name: url_length
fields.description: The length of the URL string.

fields.name: typed_count
fields.description: The number of times the address of the webpage was typed in the browser .

examples.title: Example: Show visited URLs that have the trellix.com domain
Hunting for indicators of attack - IoAs: http activity
examples.v2_query:
BrowserHistory visit_count, url, browser
    WHERE BrowserHistory url_length greater than "255"
        AND BrowserHistory url contains "pastebin.com"

examples.title: BrowserHistory entries where browser equals "Google Chrome Mozilla Firefox Microsoft Edge Microsoft Internet Explorer"

and.name: BrowserHistory
and.value: Google Chrome Mozilla Firefox Microsoft Edge Microsoft Internet Explorer
